sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50199" key="i)quma/xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰθυ-μάχος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n50199.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fighting fairly and openly</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:137" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">137</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
